hooks.command: cd /path/to/bhl-oms && (case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" in *.go) gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd web && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac) || true
hooks.description: Auto-format Go và TypeScript sau mỗi lần Claude ghi file

hooks.command: echo '=== CONTEXT COMPACTED ===' && echo 'Re-read: CURRENT_STATE.md, TECH_DEBT.md, KNOWN_ISSUES.md' && echo 'Critical: pgx needs ::text cast, use local Redis (not Docker), no refactor of old code'
hooks.description: Nhắc nhở context quan trọng sau khi Claude nén conversation

hooks.command: echo '=== SESSION CHECKLIST ===' && echo '1. CURRENT_STATE.md updated?' && echo '2. CHANGELOG.md written?' && echo '3. TASK_TRACKER.md marked?' && echo '4. New decisions in DECISIONS.md?' && echo '5. CLAUDE.md updated with lessons learned?'
